titlestmt.titleproper: Ancient-Early Medieval Architecture Lantern Slide Collection
Ancient-Early Medieval Architecture Lantern Slide Collection
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Katherine Haskins

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday September 23, 2019 at 23:07
Transformed with yale.addEadidUrl.xsl. Adds @url with handle for finding aid. Overwrites @url if already present.

did.unittitle: Ancient-Early Medieval Architecture Lantern Slide Collection
did.abstract: Collection consists of black and white glass lantern slides of ancient- Early Medieval architecture.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University. Further use of this material may be subject to the copyright laws of the United States (Title 17, United States Code) or to site license or other rights management terms or conditions.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Ancient-Early Medieval Architecture Lantern slide Collection, Arts Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection consists of black and white glass lantern slides of ancient- Early Medieval architecture.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by region or nationality. Sub-divided by site and building type or name.
